---
title: "The Rev. Joseph Mercer Cox"
---

## The Rev. Joseph Mercer Cox

### Description

Vicar of St. Mary’s Plympton

### Biography

He succeeded The Rev. Merton Smith as Vicar of St. Mary’s Plympton.

### Letters

- Letter from March 28th [1884] 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
